Santa: Ho, ho, ho! Merry Christmas!
Speaker 2: Santa!
Santa: Hey!
turtle-man: What are you doing here, Santa?
Santa: Well, I'm here to see my old buddy Ben. What are you doing here, weird…turtle-man?
turtle-man: I'm the Holiday Armadillo, your part-Jewish friend. You sent me here to give Ben some presents. Remember?
Santa: What?
Speaker 2: Did you bring me any presents, Santa?
Santa: You bet I did, Ben, put it there! Well, it would have worked this time, if his hands weren't so damn small! Ho, ho, ho!
Speaker 4: Okay Ben, why don't you come open some more presents, and Santa, the Armadillo, and I have a little talk in the kitchen? There's a sentence, I never thought I'd say.
